CustomField.formula: ( PC_Baseline_Grant_capital_spend__c + PC_No_of_homes_to_EPC_C__c + PC_No_Homes_which_will_not_reach_EPC_C__c + PC_No_of_Homes_to_EPC_A_or_B__c + PC_Starting_No_of_Social_Homes_EPC_C_A__c + PC_Starting_No_of_Social_Homes_EPC_G_D__c + PC_Total_Baseline_Measures_Trustmark__c + PC_Total_homes_to_be_upgraded__c + PC_Total_Homes_lodged_with_Trustmark__c ) / 9
CustomField.label: % CF MS2 Overall Progress
